subject: Fix catalog SDC IP address
commit_message:
Fix catalog SDC IP address

Change-Id: I89d088e8cb571428d5def970b79726d51b4483ac
Issue-ID: VFC-887
Signed-off-by: Denes Nemeth <denes.nemeth@nokia.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/vfc-nfvo-catalog-master-verify-java/314

Patch Set 1:

> (1 comment)
In ONAP R1, we modified the value manually in CMCC lab when we tested the VoLTE usecase.
Normally, you should add SDC_BASE_URL as a environment variable when you start your docker service, and the value should be MSB address, 
For example:
docker run -i -t -d -p 8806:8806 --name vfc_catalog -e SDC_BASE_URL=http://10.0.14.1:80/api -e MSB_ADDR=10.0.14.1:80 nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/vfc/catalog

then the value of SDC_BASE_URL will be replace by the following script in instance_config.sh.
if [ $SDC_BASE_URL ]; then
    sed -i "s|SDC_BASE_URL.*|SDC_BASE_URL = '$SDC_BASE_URL'|" vfc/nfvo/catalog/catalog/pub/config/config.py
fi

but this is not a goog way because the IP address is same in SDC_BASE_URL and MSB_ADDR, so we don't need to and two environment variable here.


There is a truely problem here is that we should replace the value of SDC_BASE_URL and AAI_BASE_URL with MSB_ADDR in config.py

I give you for an example, in onap release 1, we used sdc and aai base url in CMCC lab as the following:
SDC_BASE_URL = "http://10.0.14.1:80/api"
AAI_BASE_URL = "http://10.0.14.1:80/aai/v11"
We call sdc or aai through MSB, and vfc use http to access sdc or aai.

One way to solve this automatic substitution of variables is that we can replace the value of SDC_BASE_URL and AAI_BASE_URL in settings.py.
For example:
from catalog.pub.config import config as pub_config
pub_config.SDC_BASE_URL = "http://%s:%s/api" % (pub_config.MSB_SERVICE_IP, pub_config.MSB_SERVICE_PORT)
we replace the IP in SDC_BASE_URL and AAI_BASE_URL when we start our docker service.

How do you think? Please tell me if I am wrong, thanks.
